title: South Korea passes special bill to implement its $350 billion U.S. investment pledge
summary: Seoul will now have the legal framework it needs to carry out its investment commitment made to Washington in exchange for more favorable "reciprocal" tariff rates.

title: Hong Kong arrests hedge fund and brokerage staff in $300mn insider trading probe
summary: Authorities allege brokers accepted bribes in exchange for information on share placements

title: Oil trades close to $100 after attacks in Gulf
summary: Ships and energy infrastructure in the Gulf hit by new wave of strikes

title: Legal battle intensifies over £3bn bitcoin haul seized by British police
summary: Victims of Chinese crypto fraud fight to stop Treasury capturing inflated value of the currency

title: Oil Prices Surge Despite Record-Breaking Strategic Reserve Release
summary: Oil prices climbed sharply on Wednesday even after the International Energy Agency announced the largest coordinated release of strategic oil reserves in its history, underscoring the scale of supply concerns stemming from escalating tensions in the Middle East. title: Social Security 2027 cost-of-living adjustment forecast may rise with high oil prices
summary: The Social Security cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be 1.7% to 2.8%, according to new estimates. But that could increase if inflation climbs higher.

title: China Stockpiles Soften the Blow of the Global Oil Shock
summary: The world’s top crude oil and LNG importer, China, is not as exposed and vulnerable to energy deliveries from the Middle East as one might think.
